---
title: "vignette"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width=7, fig.height=6) 
```

```{r setup}
library(kableExtra)
```

This vignette serves as a showcase of how the functions written in 
inverse_transformation.R can be used.
